重大頭條（股市相關） ·

艾克曼轉押微軟：自2月起加碼、申報約24億美元部位，並出清 AlphabetAckman Rotates Into Microsoft, Exits Alphabet as 13F Reveals $2.4B Stake

https://news.cnyes.com/news/id/6460915

  • 潘興廣場依監管申報揭露新建立的大額微軟部位，市值約24億美元，並自2月財報後股價回落起逢低加碼。
  • 艾克曼在 X 上預告當日稍晚的 13F，稱追蹤多年且目前估值更具吸引力；消息公布後微軟週五上漲約3%。
  • 相較今年以來科技股與大盤走弱，這波走勢成為少有亮點；微軟年內跌幅與對 AI 大額投資的疑慮被點為壓力來源之一。
  • 他近年標榜價值導向並調降消費股比重，轉往大型科技股；過去曾因股價崩跌而布局 Alphabet、亞馬遜與 Meta。
  • 消息人士稱 Alphabet 在近月已遭完全出清，與第一季末尚有持股的申報紀錄形成落差，第二季已無持股。

艾克曼以潘興廣場身分公開新微軟大部位並自二月起逢低加碼，同時間軸上已清空 Alphabet；市場對 AI 投入的疑慮壓軟體族群，披露後微軟逆勢上揚約百分之三成少量亮點。

  • Pershing Square’s filing shows a roughly $2.4 billion Microsoft position built from dip-buying starting in February after the earnings pullback.
  • Ackman flagged the new stake on X ahead of the 13F, citing years of tracking and more attractive valuation; MSFT jumped about 3% Friday.
  • That gain stood out in a weak broader tape tied partly to mega-cap tech slides and nerves over heavy AI capex weighing on multiples.
  • He has leaned into large-cap tech while trimming exposure elsewhere; Alphabet, Amazon, and Meta draws followed prior sharp sell-offs in the group.
  • Reports say Alphabet was fully exited in recent months, implying a Q2 liquidation despite some Alphabet still on the Q1-end disclosure.

Ackman's Pershing added Microsoft from Feb on valuation, exited Alphabet fully by mid-year filings narrative, and MSFT rose ~3% Friday in a jittery t…
